title: Opendoor Q3 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Opendoor reported Q3 2025 results reflecting a strategic shift under new CEO Kasra Nejatian. The company acquired 1,169 homes with revenue of $915 million. Executive Summary: Q3 2025 Results: Revenue: $915 million, GAAP Gross Margin: 7.2%, Contribution Margin: 2.2%, Net Loss: $90 million. Strategic Initiatives: Capital Structure Changes: Raised $200 million via ATM equity program, Refinanced majority of 2030 convertible notes with equity. Operational Transformation: Nejatian stated we are refounding this company as a software company where our leverage comes from engineered code. Acquisition Momentum: Weekly contract pace doubled from 120 homes to 230, Q4 guidance: At least 35% increase in acquisitions. Product Innovation: Management launched over a dozen new initiatives including AI-powered home assessments and Opendoor Checkout. Profitability Path: 2026 Targets: Adjusted Operating Expenses: $255M-$265M, Contribution Margin: 5-7% target.
